prompt: Create a premium cinematic food advertisement poster for PRASUMA frozen momos in a dark moody studio setting. The composition is a square social-media-ready commercial poster with luxurious high-contrast lighting, shallow depth of field, and rich food-photography styling. In the foreground, place a rustic off-white speckled ceramic plate holding exactly 4 steamed momos, arranged naturally; 3 are whole and 1 is cut open to reveal a detailed juicy minced filling. The dumplings should look glossy, freshly steamed, delicately pleated, and lightly garnished with chopped green herbs and seasoning. Add visible wisps of steam rising from the plate and from a single momo being lifted in the upper right by a pair of dark wooden chopsticks. Near the lower right, include exactly 1 small black dipping bowl filled with soy-chili sauce. Near the lower left, place exactly 1 small bunch of fresh cilantro. In the right background, show exactly 1 standing retail product pack for chicken momos, black with a magenta top label and a serving image on the pack. Use a textured charcoal stone tabletop and a near-black background for a refined gourmet mood. Overlay elegant editorial typography in a luxury serif and clean sans-serif mix: large central headline reading CRAFTED TO PERFECTION, top-left brand lockup reading PRASUMA with "SINCE 1985", smaller left text reading "REAL INGREDIENTS. REAL FLAVOUR.", faint repeated background words across the upper middle reading "STEAM / FOLD / SERVE / SAVOUR" in multiple rows, vertical side text along the left border reading "PREMIUM • CLEAN • AUTHENTIC", and a bottom footer line reading AUTHENTIC MOMOS • READY IN MINUTES • 2026 EDITION plus the website prasuma.com. The overall look should feel like a high-end street food campaign: appetizing, polished, dramatic, modern, and premium, with realistic food textures, crisp branding, subtle smoke, and ad-agency-level product photography.
